PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ OSCAR

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VELASCO FRANCISCA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ OSCAR $553.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $553.00, 64 OTTAWA AVE. SF CA 94112 RENT TO BE PAYABLE AT THE RATE OF $7.00 PER DAY UNTIL PREMISES SUURENDERED/HABITABLE FROM 12/20/91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,200.00 FILED BY VELASCO FRANCISCA AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ OSCAR ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-19-1991 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT HERNANDEZ OSCAR
